code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import API_BASE_URL from'../config/api';import{Box,Typography,Button,Stack,Paper}from'@mui/material';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AdminDashboard=()=>{const[posts,setPosts]=useState([]);const authHeaders=()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');return token?{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}:{};};const fetchAllPosts=async()=>{const{data}=await axios.get("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/admin/posts"),{headers:authHeaders()});setPosts(data);};const deletePost=async id=>{await axios.delete("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/admin/posts/").concat(id),{headers:authHeaders()});setPosts(prev=>prev.filter(p=>p.id!==id));};useEffect(()=>{fetchAllPosts();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Box,{p:2,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{variant:"h5",mb:2,children:"Admin Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{variant:"subtitle1",mb:2,children:"Manage all posts"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Stack,{spacing:2,children:posts.map(post=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Paper,{sx:{p:2},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Stack,{direction:"row",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Box,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Typography,{variant:"h6",children:post.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Typography,{variant:"body2",color:"text.secondary",children:["by ",post.author.name," (",post.author.email,")"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Stack,{direction:"row",spacing:1,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{color:"error",variant:"outlined",onClick:()=>deletePost(post.id),children:"Delete"})})]})},post.id))})]});};export default AdminDashboard;
